_comment: This directory holds LLM-generated candidate entries awaiting human review. Files here are NEVER read by the live system. Run scripts/data_maintenance/ontology_review.py to promote entries to approved/.

_schema.source_ref: string — trace_id, query text, or other signal reference

entries.id: string — unique within this file, e.g. prop_001
entries.section: string — must be an allowed section name for the domain
entries.key: string — snake_case identifier, new or existing
entries.value: object — section-specific value, see approved/*.json for shape
entries.reason: string — one-sentence explanation citing specific signal
